title: hedypnois × polymorpha var. pinnatifida
intro: Hedypnois × polymorpha var. pinnatifida, also known as pinnatifid hedypnois, is a variety of the hedypnois plant, which is a type of shrub in the Asteraceae family. Hedypnois × polymorpha var. pinnatifida has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, making it a potential treatment for conditions like bronchitis and coughs. Hedypnois × polymorpha var. pinnatifida can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
